headline: SLB N.V. (SLB) Deepens Partnership With Nvidia
summary: SLB N.V. (NYSE:SLB) is one of the Good Stocks to Buy Now. On March 25, Reuters reported that SLB N.V. (NYSE:SLB) is deepening its partnership with Nvidia to build out advanced AI infrastructure and models for the energy sector. The report noted that this collaboration targets faster data processing, lower costs and emissions, and new […]
